old_javadoc:
/** * A functional interface like {@link Consumer} that declares a {@link Throwable}. * *

* This is a functional interface whose functional method is {@link #accept(Object)}. *

* * @param the type of the input to the operation * @param Thrown exception type. * @since 3.11 */
new_javadoc:
/** * A functional interface like {@link Consumer} that declares a {@link Throwable}. * *

* This is a functional interface whose functional method is {@link #accept(Object)}. *

* * @param the type of the argument the consumer accepts. * @param The thrown exception type. * @since 3.11 */
patch:
diff --git a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/function/FailableConsumer.java b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/function/FailableConsumer.java --- a/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/function/FailableConsumer.java +++ b/src/main/java/org/apache/commons/lang3/function/FailableConsumer.java @@ -28,8 +28,8 @@ * This is a functional interface whose functional method is {@link #accept(Object)}. *

* - * @param the type of the input to the operation - * @param Thrown exception type. + * @param the type of the argument the consumer accepts. + * @param The thrown exception type. * @since 3.11 */ @FunctionalInterface @@ -40,10 +40,26 @@ FailableConsumer NOP = Function.identity()::apply; /** + * Applies the given {@link FailableConsumer} action to the object if the consumer is not {@code null}. Otherwise, does nothing. + * + * @param consumer the consumer to consume. + * @param object the object to be consumed. + * @param the type of the argument the consumer accepts. + * @param The thrown exception type. + * @throws E Thrown when the consumer fails. + * @since 3.21.0 + */ + static void accept(final FailableConsumer consumer, final T object) throws E { + if (consumer != null) { + consumer.accept(object); + } + } + + /** * Gets the NOP singleton. * - * @param Consumed type 1. - * @param The kind of thrown exception or error. + * @param the type of the argument the consumer accepts. + * @param The thrown exception type. * @return The NOP singleton. */ @SuppressWarnings("unchecked")
commit_message:
Add FailableConsumer.accept(FailableConsumer<T, E>, T) (#1641)

Add missing test class
